CVE-2021-45707.title: An issue was discovered in the nix crate 0.16.0 and later before  ...
CVE-2021-45707.summary: An issue was discovered in the nix crate 0.16.0 and later before 0.20.2, 0.21.x before 0.21.2, and 0.22.x before 0.22.2 for Rust. unistd::getgrouplist has an out-of-bounds write if a user is in more than 16 /etc/groups groups.
